story.title: Deduplicate consecutive heartbeat/status log lines
story.description: Collapse consecutive identical log messages into a single line with a repeat count suffix in the display/TUI live log tail, keeping the full log history intact in the persisted workflow-logs.jsonl file.

project_file_index.role: Implementation site. Add and export collapseConsecutiveLogEntries helper. Apply collapseConsecutiveLogEntries to filteredLiveLogs in buildCcReviewWidgetLines before slicing the tail.
Behavior tests site. Add tests to assert that consecutive identical log entries are collapsed with a count suffix, distinct entries reset the counter, and the persisted log remains uncollapsed.
Static checks site. Assert that collapseConsecutiveLogEntries exists and is exported, and ensure existing pattern assertions remain satisfied.

definition_of_done.description: collapseConsecutiveLogEntries helper function is implemented, exported, and collapses consecutive identical normalized log entries.
edge_cases: Empty array input returns empty array.
Single entry input returns identical single entry array.
Consecutive entries with identical normalized message (via normalizeRenderableLogMessage) are merged with a suffix like ' (x3)'.
The merged entry uses the metadata (timestamp, severity, source, etc.) of the last/most-recent entry in the consecutive group.

definition_of_done.description: buildCcReviewWidgetLines integrates collapseConsecutiveLogEntries into the live-log display path.
edge_cases: TUI live logs collapse consecutive duplicates before tail slicing is applied.
Full log JSONL file is not modified, recording every single entry individually.
If a non-duplicate message arrives, the count resets correctly.

definition_of_done.description: Comprehensive tests are written in cc-review-behavior.test.ts verifying collapsing behavior.
edge_cases: A sequence of identical logs collapses to a single line with ' (x3)' suffix.
A sequence of interleaved duplicate and unique logs collapses each group correctly and resets the count.
The underlying liveLogs array is untouched (i.e. we do not mutate state.liveLogs directly, we return a new array).

definition_of_done.description: All static checks and behavior tests pass cleanly.
edge_cases: No regression on previous configurable checklist window or tail length tests.
All 60+ static checks pass in cc-review-static.test.mjs.
